overview.description: AI-based tools for accelerated drug discovery
overview.description_long: Deep MedChem is a Prague-based startup that builds the CHEESE platform — a family of AI products for drug discovery that accelerate the early phases of research. CHEESE enables molecular similarity search (2D, 3D shape, electrostatic, and activity) across 40T+ molecules in seconds, QSAR model training, and docking score prediction. Available on cloud or on-premises. Spun off from The MAMA AI and i&i Prague, an incubator connected with IOCB (Institute of Organic Chemistry and Biochemistry), a leading European medicinal chemistry institution.
overview.tagline: AI-Based Tools for Accelerated Drug Discovery

history.origin_story: Spun off from The MAMA AI and i&i Prague (a startup investor and incubator connected with IOCB Prague). Originally developed the CHEESE molecular AI platform for IOCB before commercializing it as an independent company in December 2023.

key_milestones.event: Deep MedChem a.s. incorporated (December 15, 2023) to commercialize the CHEESE family of molecular AI products
CHEESE presented at BioML Conference and BioVaria Conference
On-premise version of CHEESE Search released (January 2024)
CHEESE Electrostatics launched in open beta (May 2024)
Participated in BIO'24 conference in San Diego
CEO Jan Macek and CTO Miroslav Lžičař attended ACS Spring 2025 in San Diego

notable_people.name: David Stíbal
notable_people.role: Senior Biotech VC Expert (Supervisory Board Member)

metadata.notes: Founded December 15, 2023. Legal name: Deep MedChem a.s. IČO: 21029962. Address: Revoluční 764/17, Staré Město, Prague 1. Website is a React SPA; content extracted from JS bundle. Team page shows 6 people (3 C-suite + 1 engineer + 2 supervisory board). Spin-off from The MAMA AI and i&i Prague incubator (IOCB-connected). Main product is CHEESE platform for molecular similarity search and drug discovery AI. Partners include Microsoft for Startups.
